title: eriolobus delavayi
intro: Eriolobus delavayi, also known as the Chinese spurge or Chinese wolf's milk, is a plant species in the family Anacardiaceae. It is native to the Sichuan province in China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and salve, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional Chinese medicine.
